n: Book 4, Chapter 6: The Knowledge of the Onodrim

steps.t: Barachen is at his camp south of the Great East Road that runs through the South Trollshaws. Scouts along the road can direct you to him. Elladan told…
One of the Onodrim, a creature of ancient days, was seen in the valley of the giants south of the High Moor, high above the Bruinen. Barachen reported…
Elladan is at Thorenhad, his camp among the Bruinen Gorges, north of the bear-dens. Elladan will be troubled to learn the fate of the Onod that Barach…
